+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-2183-support-persistentvolumeclaimtemplate-in-sts",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-: Support PersistentVolumeClaimTemplate in STS",
+    "description": "Support PersistentVolumeClaimTemplate in STS. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\nhelm list -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\nkubectl get configmap -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\n```\n### Description of the feature or enhancement:\n\nSTS supports PVC templates and cdk8s should do\n\n### Use Case:\n\nTo deploy multiple pods with storage\n\n### Proposed Solution:\n\nUpdate StatefulSetProps to allow PVC template\n\n### Other:\r\r\n\n---\n\nThis is a "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support PersistentVolumeClaimTemplate in STS",
+        "description": "A `StatefulSet`, like any workload resource, has access to its containers via `sts.containers`, and then the container has support for PVC via `container.mount`. \n\n```ts\nimport * as kplus from 'cdk8s-plus-29';\nimport * as cdk8s from 'cdk8s';\n\nconst sts = new kplus.StatefulSet(chart, 'StatefulSet', { ... });\nconst container = sts.addContainer({ image: 'node' });\n\n// create the storage request\nconst claim = new kplus.PersistentVolumeClaim(chart, 'Claim', {\n  storage:\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-\nkubectl get events -n cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support PersistentVolumeClaimTemplate in STS\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "A `StatefulSet`, like any workload resource, has access to its containers via `sts.containers`, and then the container has support for PVC via `container.mount`. \n\n```ts\nimport * as kplus from 'cdk8s-plus-29';\nimport * as cdk8s from 'cdk8s';\n\nconst sts = new kplus.StatefulSet(chart, 'StatefulSet', { ...",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s-"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Statefulset",
+      "Persistentvolumeclaim"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cdk8s-team/cdk8s/issues/2183",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cdk8s-team/cdk8s"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cdk-for-kubernetes-cdk8s- installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:49:51.473Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
